related.name: Aphrodite
related.teaser: Aphrodite is a breath that bridges — Pentagram; under Venus; in Taurus; with III The Empress.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: Isis
related.teaser: Isis embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: III. The Empress
related.teaser: The Empress is the flowering womb, rose of Venus, matrix of compassion and abundance.

related.name: Osiris
related.teaser: Osiris embodies underworld, wealth, endings — under Saturn · Pluto; in Scorpio, Capricorn.

related.name: Emerald
related.teaser: Heart is the bridge—two breathing as one field of grace.

related.name: Rose Quartz
related.teaser: Heart is the bridge—two breathing as one field of grace.

related.name: Freyr
related.teaser: Freyr embodies fertility, love, prosperity — under Venus; in Taurus.

related.name: Hestia
related.teaser: Hestia embodies hearth, home, sacred flame — under Vesta/Moon; in Cancer, Virgo.

related.name: Jarilo
related.teaser: Jarilo embodies spring, descent and return — under Venus; in Virgo, Pisces.

related.name: ᛒ Berkano
related.teaser: Berkano is the green cradle — the crescent that becomes a garden.

related.name: Persephone
related.teaser: Persephone embodies spring, descent and return — under Venus; in Virgo, Pisces.
